blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,193 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
